channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][CAST] Anime News Network Go It, Nakamura! 动画 Casts Kenshō Ono, Kenta Miyake
item.description: Ono plays Kō Matsumura, Miyake plays Nobu Todoroki in last week's episode ― The staff for the television anime of Syundei's Go for It, Nakamura! (Ganbare! Nakamura-kun!!) boys-love manga confirmed on... | 来源: ANN | 原文: 'Go for It, Nakamura!' Anime Casts Kenshō Ono, Kenta Miyake

item.title: [动画][剧场版] Anime News Network 动画 Expo Screen Macross: Do You Remember Love? Film; Host Voice Actors Masakazu Morita, Machico
item.description: Other guests recently announced include: Daisuke Hirose, MEME50, Hiroyuki Watanabe, more ― Anime Expo announced on Thursday it will host "the first official North American screening" of the The Super... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Anime Expo to Screen 'Macross: Do You Remember Love?' Film; to Host Voice Actors Masakazu Morita, Machico

item.title: [动画][剧场版][发表] Anime News Network K2 Pictures 宣布 Gigant 动画, Book Human Insects Musical Film
item.description: Projects funded by "K2P Film Fund I" ― The K2 Pictures movie and video works company announced at the Cannes International Film Festival on Sunday that its "K2P Film Fund I" will finance several... | 来源: ANN | 原文: K2 Pictures Announces Gigant Anime, The Book of Human Insects Musical Film

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network TrySail Performs From Overshadowed Overpowered Anime的 Ending Song
item.description: Group performs "Dōkei" ending theme for series debuting in July ― The staff for the anime of Kentarou's From Overshadowed to Overpowered (Rakudai Kenja no Gakuin Musō: Nidome no Tensei, S-Rank Cheat... | 来源: ANN | 原文: TrySail Performs From Overshadowed to Overpowered Anime's Ending Song

item.title: [动画][公开] Anime News Network I Became a Legend After My 10 Year-Long Last Stand 动画 公开 Ending Theme Song Artist
item.description: Rock idol group Meishohikokai performs "Ari Kitari na Nichijō to Kōun na Hibi e" ― The staff for the television anime of Ezogingitune and illustrator DeeCHA's I Became a Legend After My 10 Year-Long... | 来源: ANN | 原文: I Became a Legend After My 10 Year-Long Last Stand Anime Reveals Ending Theme Song Artist

item.title: Anime News Network Japanese Animation TV Ranking, April 27-May 3
item.description: My Hero Academia: More special ranks at #4 ― Yoshifumi Kondō and Studio Ghibli's Whisper of the Heart aired on NTV on Friday, May 1 at 9:00 p.m. and earned a 7.5% rating. The live-action Thus Spoke... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Japanese Animation TV Ranking, April 27-May 3
